steps.title: Read the preparation context
steps.content: Natalie worries that time is passing too quickly for her to approach college with appropriate consideration and form a workable personality. The context points to careful inner thought and preparation.

steps.title: Select the closest meaning
steps.content: A is admiration, which the passage does not involve. B means inability to decide, not thoughtful preparation. D is kindness toward others, while the sentence focuses on Natalie's own mental process. The closest meaning is careful thought. The answer is C.
